case_title: LVNV FUNDING LLC VS. BRYDON BEASANT ET AL

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION RE: ACCEPTING COPIES IN LIEU OF ORIGINALS (TRANSACTION ID # 200001422) FILED BY PLAINTIFF LVNV FUNDING LLC

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF LVNV FUNDING LLC AS TO DEFENDANT BEASANT, BRYDON , AN INDIVIDUAL DOES 1 THROUGH 10, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  OCT-16-2019

REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, COURT JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $465.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 (TRANSACTION ID # 200001422) AS TO DEFENDANT BEASANT, BRYDON , AN INDIVIDUAL

DECLARATION IN SUPPORT OF APPLICATION FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT JUDGMENT PURSUANT TO CIVIL CODE 1788.60 (TRANSACTION ID # 200001422) FILED BY PLAINTIFF LVNV FUNDING LLC

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LVNV FUNDING LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BEASANT, BRYDON , AN INDIVIDUAL $10,075.84 PRINCIPAL, $465.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $10,540.84, SEE SCANNED DOC
